---
title: "Image list with reveal"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| eval: false
dir <- "../weeks/images/jobs"                       # your folder
ext <- "(?i)\\.(png|jpe?g|gif|webp)$" # match common image types
paths <- list.files(dir, pattern = ext, full.names = TRUE)
stopifnot(length(paths) > 0)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(glue); library(purrr)
})

html <- imap_chr(paths, function(p, i) {
  id  <- paste0("img_", i)
  fn  <- basename(p)
  glue('
<li class="mb-2">
  <a href="#" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#{id}" aria-expanded="false">{fn}</a>
  <div id="{id}" class="collapse mt-2">
    <img src="{p}" class="img-fluid rounded shadow"/>
  </div>
</li>')
})

cat('<ul class="list-unstyled">', paste(html, collapse = "\n"), '</ul>')
```
